prompt: Assess how far along the work is, the percent complete, any defects, and the remaining work.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Duct installation, part of the HVAC-R scope. The observed field condition is: sagging flex (>½ in/ft between supports). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: IMC 603, SMACNA, Manual D. Treat this as roughly 70 percent complete until defects are corrected.
title: Progress assessment: Duct installation (service call)
